blurb: Ceviche Nikkei combines citrus-cured fish with soy, chili, and herbs in a Peruvian Japanese style. The marinade sets bright acidity first, then savory depth follows with subtle marine sweetness and aromatic heat.

Banach Tarski Paradox states that one ideal sphere can be partitioned and reassembled into two spheres of equal size. The result depends on non-measurable sets and highlights limits of geometric intuition under set theory.

Cantor Set emerges by repeatedly removing middle thirds from a segment, leaving an uncountable dust with zero total length. It is central in topology and measure theory because structure survives extreme fragmentation.

Attentional Blink describes a short interval where a second target is missed after a first one is identified in rapid streams. The effect suggests bottlenecks in temporal attention despite sustained effort and intent.

Choice Blindness appears when people fail to detect mismatches between intended decisions and presented outcomes. Follow-up explanations often sound confident, revealing how post hoc reasoning can mask uncertainty in immediate awareness.

Oort Cloud names a distant reservoir of icy bodies surrounding the Solar System at vast orbital scales. Long-period comets can be perturbed inward, linking outer gravitational dynamics to visible inner-system events.

Accretion Disk forms when gas spirals around a compact object and heats through friction and compression. Emission profiles reveal velocity gradients, composition signatures, and energetic transfer within rotating plasma environments.

Ailurus fulgens inhabits temperate mountain forests and relies on arboreal movement for feeding and shelter. Seasonal habitat pressure and fragmented corridors challenge long-term population stability across its geographic range today.

Saiga tatarica migrates across open steppe regions where climate swings shape forage and breeding timing. Its specialized nasal anatomy helps filter dust and condition air in harsh seasonal conditions efficiently.

Glass Harmonica produces sustained tones from rotating glass bowls contacted by wet fingertips. Layered partials create an ethereal timbre that carries clearly, making dynamic control and intonation precision especially important.

Hurdy Gurdy uses a crank-driven wheel to bow strings continuously while keys select pitch changes. Drone resonance and rhythmic buzzing bridges support dance texture and melodic articulation in regional performance traditions.

Byzantine Fault describes a failure where a component sends contradictory information to different parts of a distributed system. Tolerating such arbitrary deception requires consensus protocols that remain correct even when some participants lie or behave unpredictably.

Klein Bottle is a non-orientable surface with no distinct inside or outside in four-dimensional embedding. In three-dimensional models it self-intersects, offering a useful visualization for topology and orientation arguments broadly.
Zorn Lemma states that a partially ordered set has a maximal element when every chain has an upper bound. It is equivalent to the axiom of choice and underpins many existence proofs.
